transcript.text:
Free food for life Including your direct families
Free!?
Really?
This will no longer be valid once the restaurant closes down
I'll give it to you if you beat the challenge
[7 different kinds of Chinese cuisine dishes]
[Try if you dare]
[Jjampong, dead]
[Chili Shrimp, destroyed]
[Sweet & sour pork, to heaven]
[Death to Japchae]
[Can she do it?]
Hello everyone
I'm here in the city of Cheonan Comedian Lee Bong Won's noodle restaurant
I got to meet him at this show called Radio Star
I've been told that his restaurant is really delicious so I'm here

[Cheonan's Bong Jjampong]
Hello
It's been so long Can I film here?
Of course
[Lee Bong Won is a comedian, small restaurant owner, and a YouTuber]
[Footage from "Radio Star"]
Do you have pinworms?
We upgraded the place recently,
There's a waitlist on the weekends
I've been wanting to try it
There are good reviews about us on the blogs
I've seen them and that's why I'm here
Do you like Jjampong? (Spicy Seafood Noodles) Yes, of course
Jjajangmyun too? (Black Bean Noodles) Yes
And fried dumplings are a must
You have to order that in English

"Service" (On the house)
Water is "Self"
Come on in
If you beat the challenge, I'll give you this Free food at Bong Jjampong for life
Including your direct family members
Really? A certificate for free food?
[It will not be easy]
[Premium Jjampong]
[Sweet & sour fried pork]
[Chili Shrimp]
[Shrimp Fried Rice]
[Jjajangmyun]
[Try if you dare]
That's huge
Thank you
The owner serving me

Thank you
I'll give you some more pickled radish
Also, something to drink as well, please
Alcohol!? No, soda
[Disclaimer: It was just her at the restaurant for the video]
Thank you
This is the Cherry Blossom Shrimp Fried Rice It's a pyramid
That's so cool
Thank you
Chili Shrimp
Japchae too (Glass Noodles with vegetables)
Thank you
Don't worry if you faint during the mukbang, I have an ambulance ready for you
This is the last thing "Service"
Thank you
This looks like a birthday feast

Can you really finish all of this?
It's manageable
Bon appetit
Some soup first
It's a pretty dirty move to just stare at someone while they eat
[But I must]
She knows how to slurp the noodles
It's a jjampong that I've never had before
It's really tasty
It's really clean, yet very savory
[Why?]
Eat then
Chili Shrimp
Looks really good The shrimp is huge
That's so good
I really love the sauce

Really?
I've been curious
Do you know how mukbangers eat a lot of food in 1 sitting?
Do you eat more afterward? Yes
You've also done alcohol mukbang, right? Yes, a couple of times
Let's do that some time
Fairly thin noodles
I had no idea
Looks good
Yummy
Feels bad to break this
[Mung bean glass noodles Japchae]
I had a little bit of everything And they're all tasty
Something in the fried pork is very nutty
Would you like some more coca cola? Yes
Thank you

How did you know right away?
How'd you know I finished it?
I just know From the angle?
The glass noodles are very jelly-like
Different from a regular glass noodle
Very chewy
[2 cans of coke down]
I'll get rid of that
It's okay
Should I leave it for display?
Thank you
The noodles are not getting bloated
Since it's pretty thin to begin with
Now it's like regular noodles
I usually can't slurp bloated noodles
Chili shrimp

What is this?
Baby octopus? Really?
Another question
Do mukbangers not eat anything before they film?
I had lunch before I came here
You eat a meal and eat again?
When I first started, I tried to eat only 1 meal a day,
But it's hard to do that now
What will be your biggest meal of the day?
Definitely dinner
But they say that you'd gain weight if you have a big dinner
The sauce is tasty
1 jjajangmyun down
Cleared
4 people usually eat 1 dish of that chili shrimp
You've already eaten 2 servings of it

How full are you right now? 50%?
No
Did you go to the hospital for a check-up?
They said I was normal
If you need to fit all that food... You'd need a big stomach
Do you exercise a lot? No
Not at all? Yes
So you just eat?
Impressive
The fried rice
I ate about 1/3 of it already
And there's still this much left
The sauce is interesting because it's transparent
It's clear
Don't you have to close and go home? It's okay
Too much

You have to dine in for Chinese cuisine for the best taste
What is this?
The baby octopus is huge
That's so spicy
It's a mix of Sichuan pepper and red pepper
This is from the Sichuan pepper, right? Yes
The top part wasn't that spicy
But the bottom is very spicy
I've been observing, You eat slow and steady
That's scarier
I eat slow
It's just if I eat the pepper The soup itself isn't spicy
[Spicy]
Pickled radish on the tongue when it's spicy
Let's finish the chili shrimp
[I must overcome]

[Chili Shrimp, destroyed]
Fried rice
This is still like a bowl of rice
That's still like 2~3 servings of food
2 big bowls of rice go in there
No wonder
I would've finished it by now if it was just 1 bowl of rice
Fried rice and jjampong soup goes really well together
[3 cans down]
More coke?
Regular people will get full from just drinking 3 cans of coke
Really?
It's good mixed with jjajangmyun
[Fried rice, dead]
That alone is a lot of food
Yes it was I was surprised

I must finish this before the spiciness comes
It's here
The spiciness is here
This is why I wanted to eat it quickly
I have to feel the pain twice
Let's get it over with
[Jjampong, dead]
Should I transport the deceased?
Leave it there?
All alone?
Here comes more coke
You've defeated half
[I must endure]
Japchae
I bit my tongue
[She's really doing the most]

Ow, my tongue
[Fried pork, to heaven]
It's gone now
Fried dumplings and japchae left
4 cans of coke gone
How do you even do that?
Would you like 1 more?
I better order more coca cola tomorrow
Thank you
They usually share that Japchae with 4 people
No wonder it was pretty big
[Death to Japchae]
RIP to these dishes
All passed away
Now for the certificate
Eat at Bong Jjampong free! For life!

It will no longer be valid when the restaurant closes down
Congratulations Thank you
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
